commit.message:
fix(terminal): use Windows-appropriate shell and PATH on win32

On Windows, SHELL is not set and /bin/bash does not exist. Fall back
to COMSPEC (cmd.exe) and skip the macOS/Linux PATH augmentation
(which uses Unix paths and the : separator).

new image was built. This ensures alembic 024 is safe to run on an
already-migrated DB without failing on duplicate column errors.

commit.message:
Fix scraper: gender h1 extraction, slug detection fallback, canonical redirect handling

- Pass raw h1 text to _extract_gender so 'for women/men' span is present before brand/gender stripping
- Replace overly-broad fallback in get_perfume_urls (all /perfume/ links) with frequency-based slug detection — most common /perfume/X/ slug on the page is the brand's actual slug (handles cases like Dior vs Christian-Dior)
- Add canonical URL validation on brand pages to detect CF blocks (homepage redirect) vs legitimate designer renames (e.g. /designers/Christian-Dior.html → /designers/Dior.html); for renames, update slug from canonical and continue
- Fix seed_brands.json: update Christian Dior URL to /designers/Dior.html (correct canonical); remove duplicate Bulgari entry (was at index 15 and 95, both /designers/Bvlgari.html)

commit.message:
feat(architecture): codebase sync — metrics stubs + AXIS comment

Section 6: Add src/api/metrics.ts with 10 canonical Prometheus metric
names per System Architecture FINAL Part 5 (Observability). Uses
existing ApprovalMetrics infrastructure; no new dependencies.

Section 8: Add AXIS Credential Vault architectural comment to
src/logicbridge/index.ts documenting boot position 6 and the current
embedded-in-LOGICBRIDGE implementation.

Canonical metric names (LOCKED per architecture doc):
  archieve_log_duration_ms, archieve_wal_depth,
  archieve_chain_verifications_total, archieve_sqlite_busy_total,
  seal_failure_total, governance_pipeline_duration_ms,
  dispatch_failure_total, gex_total (stub — GEX not yet implemented),
  idempotency_conflict_total, approval_pending_age_seconds

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(benchmarks): add conv_cifar_v6 suite with k-means filters and 30k scaling

Build conv_cifar_v6 suite (11 configs) exploring three new directions:

1. K-means filters as alternative to PCA — k-means centroids with
   triangle activation (Coates & Ng 2012) capture diverse patch
   prototypes rather than top-variance directions.  Test plain k-means
   and ZCA-whitened k-means at 10k/20k with ensembles.

2. PCA + per-patch contrast normalization — normalize_patches removes
   brightness variation at each spatial position, focusing PCA on
   texture/edge patterns.  Previously only tested with GCN (which hurt).

3. 30k ×10 scaling — v5 showed 30k ×5 hits 77.88% (new record).
   Test whether ×10 continues improving at 30k with α=2e-2.
   Also try α=1.5e-2 at ×5 (between 1e-2 and 2e-2 sweet spot).

v5 findings driving these choices:
- ×20 saturated at 20k (77.71% ≈ 77.68% at ×10)
- More filters per branch (48×3, 64×3) didn't help
- Cutout hurt -1.2% (corrupts PCA features)
- Hierarchical 2-stage disappointed (74.62% best)
- 30k + α=2e-2 is the one lever still improving

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: add stale-artifact closure fastpath (main CI green + superseded PR debt) (#305)

* refactor(prometheus): replace evolution_progress.json with worker_cycle_artifacts.json in planning workflow

- Remove state/evolution_progress.json (deprecated legacy file) from Prometheus
  workflow step 2 and replace with state/worker_cycle_artifacts.json (canonical
  cycle snapshot, schemaVersion=1).
- Add PROMETHEUS_CANONICAL_WORKFLOW_STATE_FILES exported constant to prometheus.ts
  so the planning input contract is testable and self-documenting.
- Add freshness signal guidance in the workflow prompt: Prometheus is instructed to
  check the updatedAt field of worker_cycle_artifacts.json and treat records older
  than 6 hours as historical context only.
- Add WORKER_CYCLE_ARTIFACTS_FRESHNESS_MAX_AGE_MS constant and
  buildWorkerCycleArtifactsFreshnessRecord() to cycle_analytics.ts so callers can
  integrate cycle snapshot age into the diagnostics freshness admission gate.
- Add tests: PROMETHEUS_CANONICAL_WORKFLOW_STATE_FILES contract (includes
  worker_cycle_artifacts, excludes evolution_progress, frozen); and
  buildWorkerCycleArtifactsFreshnessRecord behavior (null/missing/valid inputs).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(stale-pr-guard): treat HTTP 404 apply failure as terminal superseded state

When the GitHub API returns HTTP 404 during a MERGE or CLOSE attempt,
the PR no longer exists on GitHub (already closed/merged elsewhere).
Previously this was stored as applyState=failed, causing the guard to
re-process the artifact on every daemon cycle and trigger repeated
recovery planning.

Changes:
- orchestrator.ts: HTTP 404 on merge/close now sets applyState=superseded
  (terminal) instead of failed; idempotency gate extended to also skip
  superseded records alongside applied.
- state/pr_triage_268.json: updated from failed → superseded with
  supersededAt/supersededReason to permanently halt re-processing.
- tests/core/pr_triage_automation.test.ts: added superseded to valid
  applyState set; added HTTP 404 superseded state machine test suite
  (7 new tests); updated gate expressions to mirror full terminal check.
- tests/core/orchestrator_pipeline_progress.test.ts: updated
  isTerminalApplyState to include superseded; added VALID_APPLY_STATES
  entry; added applyState=superseded terminal test.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat: add stale-artifact closure fastpath (main CI green + superseded PR debt)

- Add STALE_SUPERSEDED_CI_GREEN to ATHENA_FAST_PATH_REASON in athena_reviewer.ts
- Add pure evaluateStaleArtifactClosureFastpath() helper in athena_reviewer.ts
- Add fetchMainBranchCiStatus() to query main branch CI via GitHub API
- Add loadStaleTriageRecords() to read state/pr_triage_*.json records
- Add runStaleArtifactClosureFastpath() to orchestrate the fastpath decision
- Inject fastpath check in runSingleCycle() before Step 4 worker dispatch:
  when all stale automated PR debt is terminal (superseded/applied) and main
  CI is green, skip worker dispatch and close the cycle via fastpath
- Add 9 tests in athena_review_normalization.test.ts for evaluateStaleArtifactClosureFastpath
- Add 11 tests in orchestrator_pipeline_progress.test.ts for loadStaleTriageRecords
  and runStaleArtifactClosureFastpath (278/278 pass)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: juniordeveloqer <antik.iskele@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: dim debug range cells by frequency opacity (#44) (#46)

Add bgOpacity prop to GridCell so debug range panels visually dim
dampened combos. Background opacity is rendered as a separate layer
so text stays fully visible. Frequency maps linearly to opacity with
a 0.2 floor.

Also normalize all GTO range constants to 1.0 frequency (binary
in-range or not) instead of variable weights.

Implement drop elision pass in IR optimizer (#75)

* Implement borrow elision pass in IrOptimizer

Add temp aliasing infrastructure with use-def tracking per temp.
Elide Borrow instructions for copy-type sources (LoadConstInt/Float/Bool)
and single-use borrows (target used exactly once). Transitive chain
resolution via ResolveTemp. RemapSourceTemps helper rewrites source temps
in all IrInst variants.

Updated tests: replaced borrow preservation test with 4 new borrow
elision tests (copy-type, single-use, chain resolution, multi-use
preservation). All 1028 unit tests + 43 LSP tests + 245 e2e tests pass.

  - P2 (2): secondary CCTLDs

commit.message:
Deduplicate judges by name in pairing reports

Tabroom emails sometimes list the same judge twice in different
sections of the email body. Added name-based deduplication so each
judge only appears once in the report.

Also added round-level dedup (team+round key) to prevent duplicate
reports if Tabroom sends both a live update and a round assignments
email for the same pairing.

commit.message:
fix: use length-check + ct_eq for constant-time auth comparison (#153)

Replace zero-padded constant-time comparison with the canonical pattern:
check lengths first (non-constant-time, acceptable since length
leakage doesn't help brute-force a high-entropy token), then ct_eq
on equal-length slices. This avoids a theoretical null-byte
false-positive in the padding approach.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(packs): reject Windows-style absolute zip entries on Linux CI

Path.is_absolute() returns False for C:/... paths on Linux/POSIX.
Add _WIN_ABS_RE pattern to _safe_extract() so zip archives with
Windows drive-letter absolute entries are rejected on all platforms.

Release robopsychology v2.6 — CLI improvements, tests

Test suite:
- 84 tests across 5 modules (prompts, engine, providers, report, CLI)
- All tests use mocked providers — no API calls needed
- pytest + pytest-cov in dev dependencies

CLI improvements:
- No-args shows welcome panel instead of bare help
- robopsych list groups prompts by observation (flowchart-based)
- robopsych list --by-level preserves original table view
- --format json flag on run/ratchet/compare for structured output

Visual improvements:
- Label indicators after each step (🟢 Observed, 🟡 Inferred, 🔴 Opaque)
- Summary dashboard table after ratchet sequence
- Scenario info panel before diagnostics start

Reports:
- Label counts per step in Markdown reports
- JSON report format with structured schema
- Heuristic next-steps recommendations section
- count_labels() and generate_next_steps() as reusable functions

Code quality:
- ruff formatting and lint fixes across all source
- Removed unused imports
- Version bumped: 2.5.0 → 2.6.0

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix bugs, add tests, and improve robustness

Bugs fixed:
- player: spurious playerStoppedMsg when switching stations (generation
  counter ensures old goroutine callbacks are ignored)
- ui: stale search results could overwrite current list (searchGen
  guards against out-of-order API responses)
- ui: displayed volume did not match mpv actual volume on startup
  (SetVolume now called in playSelected after successful Play)
- ui: search/context line rendered at wrong position in list pane
  (removed fragile post-hoc string splicing; write header lines in order)

Improvements:
- config: switch API base to all.api.radio-browser.info (DNS round-robin)
- config: MPVSocketPath is now PID-scoped (/tmp/radiogo-<pid>.sock)
- favorites: atomic write via temp file + os.Rename
- favorites: save errors surfaced to UI via tea.Cmd / favSaveErrMsg
- player: remove arbitrary 300ms sleep in observeMeta
- player: IPC write errors detected; broken conn is closed and nil'd
- ui: mpv-not-found distinguished from API errors with clearer message

Tests added:
- favorites: Toggle, Contains (including UUID-fallback-to-URL cases)
- ui: truncate, activeList, browseIsFallback, selectedStation

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(follow): leader sees follower arrival after room description (#403)

When followers auto-move with the leader, the leader now sees
'FollowerName follows you.' AFTER their own room description instead
of the generic 'arrives' message that was being sent (and lost) before
the room description rendered.

Changes:
- moveFollowers returns follower names; deferred notifications sent
  after deliverResult in handleCommandMessage
- broadcastPlayerMovement excludes leader from generic arrival for
  followers (other bystanders still see 'arrives')
- New integration tests verify ordering, leader message, and bystander
  behavior

commit.message:
fix: rewrite scraper to use curl_cffi for Cloudflare bypass

- Replace Playwright with curl_cffi (impersonate='chrome131') which
  spoofs Chrome's TLS fingerprint and reliably bypasses Fragrantica's
  Cloudflare Bot Management without needing a proxy.

- Rewrite all extraction methods with selectors based on actual rendered
  HTML analysis:
  - Name/brand: h1 with separator=' ' to handle <span> children
  - Notes: primary = description paragraph regex, fallback = pyramid
    .pyramid-level-container divs (ordered top→mid→base)
  - Accords: h6[text='main accords'] → sibling div → width-% bars
  - Year: 'was launched in YYYY' from description
  - Gender: h1 'for women/men/women and men' span

- Add canonical URL validation to detect and retry CF silent redirects
  (homepage served instead of requested page).

- Remove proxy config (PROXY_CONFIG, PROXY_ROTATE_EVERY) — no longer
  needed; machine residential IP with curl_cffi works without a proxy.

- Update DELAY_MIN/MAX to 4–8s for human-like pacing.

- Update requirements.txt: swap playwright for curl_cffi>=0.15.0.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
improve: enhanced edit generation for insertions and better LLM guidance

Key changes:
- _GENERATE_EDIT_SYSTEM: explicit insertion pattern with example, clearer rules
- _generate_edit(): show file with line numbers for LLM reference
- _generate_edit(): retry with insertion hint on empty 'old' field
- _IMPLEMENT_SYSTEM: encourage specific edit descriptions (function name, location)
- _REPLAN_EDIT_SYSTEM: mention insertion pattern in rules

Root cause: LLMs couldn't produce correct edits for INSERTION tasks because
the prompt only covered modifications. For insertions (adding new code), the
LLM must include surrounding context in 'old' and context+new code in 'new'.
The prompts now explicitly teach this pattern with examples.
